title: Zydus Lifesciences is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Zydus Lifesciences is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
